description: You are logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as admin (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Update the 'Lean Bulk Plan' macronutrient goals (Protein, Carbohydrates, and Fat) based on the most recent body weight entry. Use the following targets: Protein at 2.5g/kg, Carbohydrates at 4.0g/kg, and Fat at 1.0g/kg. Round all values to the nearest whole gram.
